title: Doris' Delight
body:
This mod adds pierogi from the fanatastical country: Poland! Just like in the stories you can now make your own pierogi! Using the mods new items: Cheese, Mashed Potato and Diced onions alongside some wheat dough, you can make your own pierogi and eat it!

To embark on this Pierogi quest, you must first obtain wheat dough, craftable via farmers delight by use of 3 wheat and an egg.
Your next task will be to obtain mashed potato, simply obtained by chopping up some diced potatoes, which can be made by also cutting potatoes on a chopping board.
All good pierogi needs some flavour, so add some chopped onions to your pierogi.
Then finally add some cheese (made by putting milk and water in a pot) to bring the dish of legend together. 

Crafting all these items together will yield you the Pierogi! From the fictional country of Poland! Congratulate yourself by eating some with friends.

Future versions will have more pierogi fillings and other variations of pierogi!!

This mod was made for a friend who likes pierogi
